headline: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Breaks Above Core FFO Estimates in Q2 2026 Despite Merger Uncertainty
summary: AvalonBay Communities (AVB) Q2 2026 Core FFO of $2.86 beat guidance, while revenue of $777.8M was in line. Same-store NOI rose 1.0%, but full-year outlook is suspended amid the Equity Residential merger.

raw.headline: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Breaks Above Core FFO Estimates in Q2 2026 Despite Merger Uncertainty

headline: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Provides Q2 2026 Results, Increases Same Store Outlook, and Suspends EPS, FFO, and Core FFO Outlook Due to Proposed Merger
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., July 22, 2026--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) (the "Company") reported Earnings per Share – diluted ("EPS"), Funds from Operations attributable to common stockholders - diluted ("FFO") per share and Core FFO per share (as defined in this release) for the three and six months ended June 30, 2026 and 2025 as detailed below.
